name: The Substitute
overview: In this hidden camera prank show, celebrities are transformed by a team of special effects artists to go undercover as substitute teachers to surprise a class of unsuspecting students. A $25,000 donation will be made to each school.

trailers.title: [HD] The Substitute 🎥 FULL Brand New Season w/ JoJo Siwa, Asher Angel, Cooper Barnes and More
